title: Add bilingual French support with language switcher

requirements.text: Create a language switcher UI component in the header (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) displaying 'EN | FR' text positioned near the navigation menu, allowing users to toggle between English and French languages without changing the header structure, logo, or existing navigation links.

quotes: Create a simple language switcher in the header showing "EN | FR".

acceptanceCriteria: Language switcher displays 'EN | FR' text in the header
Switcher is positioned near navigation menu and easily visible
Clicking 'EN' switches to English language
Clicking 'FR' switches to French language
Header structure, logo, and navigation links remain unchanged

requirements.text: Implement language state management using React context or state hooks to track the currently selected language (English or French) and provide it to all components across the application, with the default language set to English.

quotes: When user clicks "FR", show the website in French. When user clicks "EN", show the website in English.

acceptanceCriteria: Language state is managed via React context or state hooks
Current language (English or French) is accessible to all components
Default language is English on initial page load
Language selection persists across page navigation

requirements.text: Translate all text content on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to clear, simple French that farmers can easily understand, including hero headline, subtitle, availability text, section titles, Four Pillars card content, How It Works step descriptions, testimonials, stats text, and all CTA button labels, while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in both languages.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.
Keep the name "MORSHID" exactly the same in both languages, do not change it.

acceptanceCriteria: All Home page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages
French translations are natural and easy for farmers to understand
All hero text, card content, testimonials, stats, and buttons are translated

requirements.text: Translate all text content on the For Farmers page (frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx) to clear, simple French that farmers can easily understand, including hero title, subtitle, service card titles, service card descriptions, FAQ questions and answers, and CTA section text, while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in both languages.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.
Keep the name "MORSHID" exactly the same in both languages, do not change it.

acceptanceCriteria: All For Farmers page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages
Service cards, FAQ content, and CTA text are translated
French translations are natural and relatable to farmers

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.

acceptanceCriteria: All Contact page text is translated to simple, farmer-friendly French
The name 'MORSHID' remains unchanged in both languages

requirements.text: Translate all text content in the header component (frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx) including navigation link labels ('Home' → 'Accueil', 'For Farmers' → 'Pour les Agriculteurs', 'Contact' → 'Contact'), while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in the logo.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.
Keep the name "MORSHID" exactly the same in both languages, do not change it.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation links display in French when French is selected
Home becomes 'Accueil', For Farmers becomes 'Pour les Agriculteurs', Contact remains 'Contact'
The MORSHID logo text remains unchanged in both languages
Language switcher displays correctly in both languages

requirements.text: Translate all text content in the footer component (frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx) to French while maintaining the exact structure and keeping technical details (email, phone number, company name) unchanged, and keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged in the logo.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.
Keep the name "MORSHID" exactly the same in both languages, do not change it.

acceptanceCriteria: Footer text displays in French when French is selected
Technical details (email, phone, company name) remain unchanged
The MORSHID logo in footer remains unchanged
Footer structure and layout remain unchanged

requirements.text: Translate all text content in the WhatsApp floating button component (frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloatingButton.tsx) including any tooltip or aria-label text, while keeping the WhatsApp link destination unchanged.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.

acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button tooltip/aria-label displays in French when French is selected
WhatsApp link destination (https://wa.me/212623237732) remains unchanged
Button functionality and positioning remain unchanged

requirements.text: Translate all text content in the LogoPopup component (frontend/src/components/LogoPopup.tsx) including the title 'With MORSHID' and the message text 'Nothing to lose, everything to gain. Expert advice, saved time, better harvests, higher profits.', while keeping the name 'MORSHID' unchanged and ensuring the modal structure, close button, and click-outside-to-close functionality remain unchanged.

quotes: Translate all content to simple French that farmers can understand.
Keep the name "MORSHID" exactly the same in both languages, do not change it.

acceptanceCriteria: Popup title and message display in French when French is selected
The name 'MORSHID' in the title remains unchanged
Modal structure, close button, and functionality remain unchanged
French translation is simple and farmer-friendly

constraints: Do not change the header structure, logo, or existing navigation link destinations
Do not change any page layouts, images, colors, backgrounds, spacing, or component structure
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/components/ui (immutable)
Keep the name 'MORSHID' exactly the same in both languages everywhere it appears
Maintain all existing functionality: buttons, links, hover effects, active link highlighting, accordion functionality
Keep all technical details unchanged: email addresses, phone numbers, WhatsApp links, URLs
Do not change the footer layout, colors, or structure
nonGoals: Adding additional languages beyond English and French
Changing brand colors or visual styling
Changing page structure or component architecture
Modifying image assets or hero backgrounds
Changing button styling or card layouts
Adding language detection based on user location
Persisting language selection to localStorage or cookies
